case_title: ABSALOM CRISTOBAL VS. TEAM PERSON INC.

docket_entries.description: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRISTOBAL, ABSALOM AS TO DEFENDANT TEAM PERSON INC. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-27-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-22-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-05-2016
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-13-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ABSALOM CRISTOBAL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-13-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-30-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-14-2017 CONTINUED TO JUN-13-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. ***NOTE: IF NO APPEARANCE MADE ON JUNE 13, 2017 THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS CASE**** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-13-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-27-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-13-2017 AT 10:30 AM., PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRISTOBAL, ABSALOM ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court ordered Case Dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Judge: Richard A Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Continued To Jun-13-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400,00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to June 13, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
